text: Kal raat Papa se bahut zyada behas hui kyunki ek aur rishta mana ho gaya aur wo keh rahe hain ki meri kundali mein hi koi dosh hai jo baat nahi ban rahi. Main subah se bas kamre mein roye ja raha hoon, dimaag ekdum sunn hai aur samajh nahi aa raha ki unhe kaise samjhaun ki main ye sab nahi kar sakta. Itna bura lag raha hai ki lagta hai main kabhi kisi ke layak nahi ban paunga, bas rone ka mann kar raha hai.

Mummy ne kal raat kaha ki 'log kya kahenge' ki itne saare rishtey laut rahe hain aur ab woh meri bahar nikalne par aur pabandi lagayenge. Meri asli identity chhupate chhupate main itna thak gaya hoon ki ab bas ghabrahat ho rahi hai aur saans phool rahi hai. Kuch bhi sochna namumkin lag raha hai, bas ek ajeeb sa darr baith gaya hai dimaag mein aur dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai.

Kal raat ki ladaai ke baad Papa ne bol diya ki caste mismatch toh bahana hai, meri 'shakhsiyat' mein hi koi khot hai isliye rishtey nahi tikte. Main itni zyada overwhelmed hoon ki bas ek kone mein baithi hoon, na office ka kaam ho raha hai na kisi se baat karne ka mann hai. Flood of emotions itna zyada hai ki mujhe lag raha hai meri saari koshish aur meri asliyat sab mitti mein mil gayi.

Raat ko ladaai khatam hi nahi hui aur Mummy ne kaha ki dowry ki baatein toh baad mein aati hain, pehle ladka toh haan bole. Main itni toot chuki hoon ki bas sunn hokar leti hoon, na bhook lag rahi hai na pyaas, bas ek gehra dard mehsus ho raha hai. Is waqt main koi solution dhoondne ke layak hi nahi bachi, bas lag raha hai ki main sabke liye ek bojh ban gayi hoon.

Kal raat jab Papa ne kaha ki meri wajah se khandaan ki 'izzat' bazaar mein uchal rahi hai kyunki rishtey mana ho rahe hain, toh mera gala rone se bhar gaya. Main itni zyada emotional flooding mehsus kar rahi hoon ki dimaag mein bas wahi kadwi baatein cheekh rahi hain. Samajh nahi aa raha ki is urban isolation mein kisse baat karun, bas lag raha hai ki sab khatam ho gaya hai.
